===== yoomd-appcatalog-token.sh contents =====
#!/bin/bash
# Silently mint a YooMD delegated Graph token with AppCatalog.ReadWrite.All scope,
# using the OpenClaw-AppPublisher AAD app + the refresh token saved at
# SDN-YooVault/yoomd-graph-refresh-token-appcatalog.
# Rotates the refresh token in vault. Outputs access token to stdout.
set -euo pipefail
CLIENT_ID=9f4cd925-fcc7-4f42-8dc2-ae98bcad28a6
TENANT=organizations
SECRET_NAME=yoomd-graph-refresh-token-appcatalog
RT=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name "$SECRET_NAME" --query value -o tsv)
[ -z "$RT" ] && { echo "ERROR: no refresh token at $SECRET_NAME" >&2; exit 1; }
RESP=$(curl -s -X POST "https://login.microsoftonline.com/$TENANT/oauth2/v2.0/token" \
  --data-urlencode "client_id=$CLIENT_ID" \
  --data-urlencode "grant_type=refresh_token" \
  --data-urlencode "refresh_token=$RT" \
  --data-urlencode "scope=AppCatalog.ReadWrite.All offline_access")
ACCESS=$(echo "$RESP" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get("access_token") or "")')
NEW_RT=$(echo "$RESP" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get("refresh_token") or "")')
if [ -z "$ACCESS" ]; then
  echo "ERROR:" >&2
  echo "$RESP" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("error_description","?"))' >&2
  exit 1
fi
if [ -n "$NEW_RT" ] && [ "$NEW_RT" != "$RT" ]; then
  echo -n "$NEW_RT" | az keyvault secret set --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name "$SECRET_NAME" --file /dev/stdin >/dev/null
fi
echo "$ACCESS"

===== Get token + check user identity =====
token-script-rc=0 token-len=3019
{
  "displayName": null,
  "userPrincipalName": null,
  "id": null
}

===== Read current manifest id from zip =====
manifest.id = 12cf2853-565f-4288-bb13-b4d880ea4fa3

===== Check if Aixa app already in catalog =====
{
  "count": 1,
  "entries": [
    {
      "id": "05db4e89-bf71-4f52-b8b3-67f859a44c1b",
      "externalId": "12cf2853-565f-4288-bb13-b4d880ea4fa3",
      "displayName": "Aixa AI Agent",
      "distributionMethod": "organization"
    }
  ]
}
